title: Grilled Portuguese Steak with Garlic
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring a grilled steak marinated in a mixture of garlicky goodness, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, salt, and pepper to make the garlicky marinade.
Season the steak with salt and pepper on both sides.
Brush the garlicky marinade on both sides of the steak.
Place the steak on the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steak to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve immediately.
